requests.name: short-status-check
requests.text: Summarize the current system status in two short bullet points and call out any immediate risk.

requests.name: repo-analysis
requests.text: Analyze this Go repo from a reliability perspective. Focus on REST ingress, provider retries, SQLite write pressure, and any background work that can amplify latency.

requests.name: long-context-followup
requests.text: We are validating a production-like chat workload. Please respond with a concise plan that mentions session reuse, context growth, persistence contention, upload handling, rate limits, and conversation listing under write load. Also note whether the request path is likely CPU-bound, IO-bound, or externally latency-bound.

requests.name: upload-review
requests.text: Review the uploaded files and return a short action list. Mention any anomalies, missing metadata, and whether the content looks safe to process.
